blended.narrative: Big White is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,774 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
